## Meeting purpose

[Weekly kickoff meeting between Alice and Marcel to align on priorities, discuss ongoing projects, and address personal updates.](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Priority focus on Ramp and Redit projects; Marcel traveling to NY (9/15-9/19) for Ramp workshop](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Transitioning out of Deepgram role; Tuesdays will open up for other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Need to coordinate breakfast catering for 20 people in NY; research delivery options](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Adjusting calendar management: keeping Fridays for focus time/workshops, moving recurring meetings to bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Alice moving to a new, larger house this weekend](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Marcel putting in notice at Deepgram, negotiating transition details](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Marcel's birthday on September 25th (calendar blocked)](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

### Ramp Project Priorities

  - [Ensure all Ramp/Redit tasks are completed with high quality](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Schedule NY trip (9/15-9/19) for in-person workshop on 9/18](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Coordinate travel logistics for Marcel, wife, and baby](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Listen to kick-off call recording and schedule follow-up tasks](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

### Breakfast Catering for NY Meeting

  - [Research options for coffee delivery/cart service for 20 people](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Investigate bakeries (e.g., Tartine) for group ordering and delivery](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Aim for 8 AM delivery on the day of the event](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Consider DoorDash for last-minute orders if needed](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Ko-fi Device Shipment

  - [Alice to schedule call with Dimbitra for process clarification](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Determine account creation process and expedite shipments](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Pricing approved in hiring channel](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Calendar Management

  - [Move Lightbox meeting from Friday](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Adjust recurring Home Base meeting to bi-weekly with Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Keep Fridays for focus time, workshops, or travel](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Confirm Gil's availability for Friday in-person meeting](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Email Organization

  - [Shift away from using "FYI" label; archive non-action items directly](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Clear inbox and respond to urgent emails](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Carrillo Event Registration

  - [Alice to register Marcel using provided promo code](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Use GrowthX email and information for registration](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Personal Assistance Expansion

  - Add Marcel's wife (<nat@growthxlabs.com>) to Slack
  - [Coordinate with wife via WhatsApp for personal tasks (e.g., pet grooming, barber appointments)](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Assist in categorizing personal Amazon subscriptions as potential business expenses](https://fathom.video/share/y7UiPb4AyWE6xuShim8eqiQwRnbz8ZZr?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
